dc_description_s: This data represents roads for La Crosse County, Wisconsin in 2026. [La Crosse County adopted the NG911 Wisconsin state standard for road centerlines in 2022. La Crosse County is in the process of switching road types from legacy to new state standard types. The data has attribute names with 'Legacy” fields, which is where past road type designations will be listed. These are referencing the way the data is/was in the Master Street Address Guide (MSAG) and may differ that what is currently and commonly used as the authoritative road centerline data. For example, when La Crosse County adopted the state NG 9-1-1 standards the road types such as County Highway may have previously been known as County Road or County Trunk. State Highway may have been known previously as State Road. The key field attribute information to be utilized for labeling by anyone downloading the data would be as follows. FullStNm – Full Street Name Or abFullStNm – Abbreviated Full Street nameInfo regarding the details of any of the other attribute fields that are not self-evident can be found at the Wisconsin State Next Generation 911 website included in the credits or through the La Crosse County Land Information Department staff by referencing the RCL, NG911 or the Central Square CAD product.]
uw_supplemental_s: This is an archived copy of data held at UW-Madison.
